zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Wingfield III於1432年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington29歲，母親Elizabeth Goushill28歲。他於1452年與Anne de Handling在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1481年11月23日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Wingfield III于1432年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington29岁，母亲Elizabeth Goushill28岁。他于1452年与Anne de Handling在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1481年11月23日在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Wingfield III was born in 1432, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Goushill, was 28. He married Anne de Handling in 1452, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 23 November 1481, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Wingfield III est né en 1432, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Goushill, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anne de Handling en 1452, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1481, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Wingfield III 1432 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Goushill 28. Er hat 1452 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Anne de Handling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 23. November 1481 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wingfield III è nato il nel 1432 nel Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Goushill, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anne de Handling nel 1452, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 23 novembre 1481, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wingfield IIIが1432年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Wingfield of Letheringtonは29歳，母Elizabeth Goushillは28歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでAnne de Handlingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1481年11月23日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wingfield III(이)가 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Goushill(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 Anne de Handling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1481년 11월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wingfield III nasceu em 1432, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Goushill, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne de Handling em 1452, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1481, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Wingfield III родился в 1432 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Goushill, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de Handling в 1452 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 23 ноября 1481 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Wingfield III nació en 1432, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Goushill, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Anne de Handling en 1452, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1481, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
